title: SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
